name: solo-today-page
title: Today command center
description: Calendar, task queue, and non-executable agent status for a solo operator.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-page-implementation.generated.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.workspace-shell",
  "workspace": "solo",
  "implementationStatus": "mounted-react-workspace-page",
  "source": "registry/workspaces/solo/workspace-shell.json",
  "primitiveFactory": {
    "version": "2026-06-09.framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "source": "packages/ui/src/primitive-components.mjs",
    "implementationStatus": "framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "page": {
    "id": "page.solo.today",
    "title": "Today command center",
    "description": "Calendar, task queue, and non-executable agent status for a solo operator.",
    "components": [
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "panel"
    ]
  },
  "routes": [
    {
      "path": "/solo/today",
      "page": "page.solo.today",
      "title": "Today command center",
      "blocks": [
        "block.solo.agenda",
        "block.solo.task-queue",
        "block.solo.agent-status"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "id": "block.solo.agenda",
      "title": "Agenda",
      "component": "data-list",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-agenda-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "long-content"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.solo.task-queue",
      "title": "Task queue",
      "component": "data-list",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-task-queue-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "empty"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.solo.agent-status",
      "title": "Agent status",
      "component": "agent-panel",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-agent-status-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "error"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "components": [
    "agent-panel",
    "button",
    "data-list",
    "panel"
  ],
  "evidence": {
    "renderedBlockCount": 3,
    "responsiveLayout": "single-column-safe mounted React composition",
    "a11yStructure": "page routes compose labelled resident React block implementations",
    "displayOnly": true
  },
  "runtime": {
    "runtimeReactRenderer": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": true
  },
  "reactMount": {
    "schemaVersion": "2026-06-12.mounted-react-workspace-routes",
    "source": "packages/ui/src/workspaces.mjs",
    "packageName": "@jami-studio/ui",
    "rendererBoundary": "React workspace components are install-time/app code, not harness-originated renderer payload execution.",
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "serverRenderedStaticRoutes": true,
    "routeArtifact": "apps/workbench/dist/suites/solo/solo-today.html"
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "registry/workspaces/solo/workspace-shell.json",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Generated standalone page descriptor plus mounted React page route evidence from the authored workspace shell.
